settings.label: Enable purchase token removal popup
settings.info: Once you verify the purchase code in this store, enable the option if you want to remove it. [Need help? View documentation](https://themihub.gitbook.io/ambaz-shopify-theme/getting-started/purchase-code-verify)

settings.label: t:settings_schema.favicon.settings.favicon.label
settings.info: t:settings_schema.favicon.settings.favicon.info

settings.label: Languages support RTL
settings.info: Enter the ISO language code, separate by comma. Leave blank to enable for all languages. [Check ISO language code](https://www.loc.gov/standards/iso639-2/php/code_list.php)

settings.label: Page width
settings.info: This width of the page will affect larger devices> 1200px

definition.label: Highlight text gradient
definition.info: "Highlight text gradient" replaces "Highlight text" where possible.

settings.info: t:settings_schema.typography.settings.type_body_font.info

settings.label: Font URL
settings.info: e.g: Font_URL@font_weight&Font_URL@font_weight [Learn more about custom fonts.](https://themihub.gitbook.io/suruchi-theme/theme-settings/typography)

settings.info: t:settings_schema.typography.settings.type_header_font.info

settings.label: Font URL
settings.info: e.g: Font_URL@font_weight&Font_URL@font_weigh [Learn more about custom fonts.](https://themihub.gitbook.io/suruchi-theme/theme-settings/typography)

settings.label: Accent font
settings.info: Used for special emphasis elements. Defaults to the same font as Body.

settings.label: Display font
settings.info: Used for hero text and large decorative headings. Defaults to the same font as Body.

settings.label: Heading font source
settings.info: Which font slot all headings use by default

settings.content: Enable custom styles per heading level. All settings below are opt-in — existing stores are not affected until a level is enabled.

settings.label: Show wishlist button of entire store
Show compare button of entire store
Enable color swatches
settings.info: To display color swatches, you need to enable it. [Learn more](https://themihub.gitbook.io/suruchi-theme/theme-settings/color-swatches).

settings.label: Cart button type
settings.info: It works when you select "Card Style 3"

settings.label: Show pre-order button
settings.info: You may want to allow customers to purchase out-of-stock items. [Learn more](https://themihub.gitbook.io/suruchi-theme/general-topics-faq/how-to-enable-the-pre-order-product-to-your-store)

settings.label: Show countdown
settings.info: To display countdown timer, you need to enable it. [Learn more](https://themihub.gitbook.io/suruchi-theme/collections-and-products/products/add-a-countdown-timer-to-the-product).

settings.label: Actions buttons position on desktop
settings.info: It works, when you enable the Card style "Style 2"

settings.label: Low inventory threshold
settings.info: Choose 0 to always show in stock if available.

settings.label: Show always status
settings.info: If you disable it, the inventory status will show based on the product's quantity. You can set "Minimum number" in the option below to display inventory status.

settings.label: Minimum number of quantity
settings.info: It works until you enable "Show always "

settings.label: Continue selling
settings.info: You may want to allow customers to purchase out-of-stock items. [Learn more](https://themihub.gitbook.io/vector-shopify-theme/general-topics-faq/how-to-enable-the-pre-order-product-to-your-store)

settings.label: Enable color swatches
settings.info: Color selections are displayed in swatches on the product card, allowing you to swiftly select.

settings.label: Color swatch activation
settings.info: Define the color option name. Supports multiple names separated by commas for multi-language stores (e.g., Color,Colour,Farbe). [Learn more](https://themihub.gitbook.io/suruchi-theme/theme-settings/color-swatches)

settings.label: Maximum number of swatches to show
Swatch style
settings.info: For custom swatches: Color uses the color name as CSS color, Image uses the variant's featured image.

settings.label: Swatches type
settings.info: Native swatches use Shopify's built-in color/image swatches. Custom swatches use variant images or color names.

settings.label: Enable color swatches on recently viewed product
Quick view style
settings.info: Choose how the quick view modal appears. All content settings are customizable in the Quick View template (Products → Quick view template).

settings.info: To display color swatches, you need to enable it. [Learn more](https://themihub.gitbook.io/suruchi-theme/theme-settings/color-swatches).

settings.info: To display countdown timer, you need to enable it. [Learn more](https://themihub.gitbook.io/suruchi-theme/collections-and-products/products/add-a-countdown-timer-to-the-product).
